SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ELENA LAUCHUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICKY JIA JU LAO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LAO, RICKY JIA JU MAILED TO RESPONDENT LAUCHUNG, ELENA

MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-31-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF ELENA LAUCHUNG. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $300.00 PAID TO PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR AT THE OEX HEARING ON SEP-19-2019 IN FULL SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED TO INFORM THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS RETAILAINTG AGAINST HER BY ONCE AGAIN HAVING ANOTHER LOCK REMOVED FROM HER DOOR ON THE DATE OF THE LAST OEX HEARING, THEREFORE ONCVE AGAIN ENDANGERING HER SAFETY AS WELL AS FILING A UNLAWFUL DETAINER MATTER AGAINST HER. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT THOSE ARE ISSUES THAT SHOULD BE ADDRESSED IN HER RESPONSE/ANSWER TO THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER MATTER. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: OEX OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-19-2019 Continued To Oct-03-19 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ricky Jia Ju Lao, Appellant/Defendant, with witness Christina Chen, is present;
Elena Lauchung, Respondent/Plaintiff, is present;

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Elena Lauchung, testifies on her own behalf. No further documentary evidence is introduced.

Ricky Jia Ju Lao, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Copy of floor plan of plaintiffs in-law unit (location)

Witness Christina Chen, testifies on behalf of appellant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem:Robert Stumpf, Clerk: William Trupek, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Judgment Entered
